title: Implement an API Client
description: Write a typed client for a REST or RPC API from its docs.
content:
Write a {{language}} client for this API:

{{api_description}}

Requirements:
- Strong types for every request and response shape.
- Centralized error handling that distinguishes network, 4xx, and 5xx failures.
- Timeouts and a single, configurable retry policy for idempotent calls.
- No secrets in code — read credentials from configuration/env.
- A short usage example for the two most common calls.
